description.en: The heaviest and one of the longest known snake species, dwelling in the rivers and swamps of South America.
description.zh: 世界上最重且最长的蛇类之一，栖息在南美洲的河流和沼泽中。

anatomy.en: The green anaconda is an absolute monster of a snake! While not the longest snake, it is definitely the heaviest, weighing up to 550 pounds (250 kg) and growing as thick as a telephone pole. It has olive-green skin with dark oval spots, and its eyes and nostrils are on the very top of its head so it can see and breathe while fully submerged.
anatomy.zh: 森蚺绝对是一条怪兽级别的蛇！虽然它不是最长的蛇，但绝对是最重的，体重可达550磅（250公斤），粗得像根电线杆。它有着橄榄绿色的皮肤和深色的椭圆形斑点，眼睛和鼻孔长在头顶，这样它在全身没入水下时也能看到东西和呼吸。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Anacondas don't have venom. Instead, they are 'constrictors'. They hide in murky water and wait for an animal like a capybara or wild pig to come for a drink. Then, they strike, wrap their massive muscular body around the prey, and squeeze tight! After a big meal, they might not need to eat again for months.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 森蚺没有毒液。相反，它们是“绞杀者”。它们躲在浑浊的水中，等待水豚或野猪等动物来喝水。然后它们会突然出击，用巨大而肌肉发达的身体缠住猎物，紧紧勒住！美餐一顿后，它们可能几个月都不需要再进食。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are the undisputed kings and queens of the Amazon! Green anacondas live in the slow-moving rivers, swamps, and marshes of the tropical rainforests in South America. They are clumsy on land but graceful and stealthy in the water.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们是亚马逊无可争议的王者！森蚺生活在南美洲热带雨林中水流缓慢的河流、沼泽和湿地中。它们在陆地上显得笨拙，但在水里却优雅而隐秘。

habitat.text_en: Amazon Basin swamps and slow-moving rivers
habitat.text_zh: 亚马逊盆地的沼泽和缓慢流动的河流
